title: ops/pack.py: unpack and pack operations
description: Implement `pypptx/ops/pack.py` with two public functions: `unpack(src: Path, dest: Path) -> Path` (pure zipfile extraction, no post-processing) and `pack(src_dir: Path, dest: Path) -> Path` (rezip with `[Content_Types].xml` as the first ZIP entry per OPC spec, writing atomically via temp-file-then-rename).
acceptance_criteria: `unpack()` extracts all ZIP entries unchanged and returns the destination directory path.
`pack()` produces a ZIP where `[Content_Types].xml` is the first entry.
`pack()` writes atomically: writes to a `.tmp` file first, then renames to `dest`.
All XML parsing within this module uses `defusedxml`; `xml.etree.ElementTree` is not imported.
Both functions raise `ValueError` with a descriptive message on bad input.
